farm.desc: Increases grain yield by 50% per level.

1.name: Fields
1.flavor: Basic grain production from tilled earth.

2.name: Granary Extension
2.flavor: Raised floors protect the harvest from rats and rot.

4.name: Three-Field System
4.flavor: Crop rotation ensures the soil never sleeps.

6.name: Irrigation Network
6.flavor: Canals bring life even in the driest summer.

10.name: Agricultural Revolution
10.flavor: The land yields bounties undreamt of by our ancestors.

lumber_mill.desc: Increases wood yield by 100% per level.

1.name: Woodcutter's Camp
1.flavor: The sound of axes rings through the trees.

7.name: Logging Empire
7.flavor: Entire forests are processed into fleets and cities.

10.name: The Great Arboretum
10.flavor: We do not just harvest nature; we master it.

fishery.desc: Increases fish yield by 50% per level.

1.name: Fishing Huts
1.flavor: Simple piers and nets for the local catch.

3.name: Fishmonger's Row
3.flavor: A bustling market for cleaning and salting the harvest.

6.name: Deep Sea Fleet
6.flavor: Sturdy boats that can handle the open waves for weeks.

10.name: The Great Harbor
10.flavor: The sea is our larder; we take what we please.

mine.desc: Increases stone/ore yield by 50% per level.

1.name: Surface Quarry
1.flavor: Extracting the easiest stones from the hillside.

3.name: Shaft Mine
3.flavor: Vertical shafts reach for deeper veins of iron and copper.

5.name: Drainage Pumps
5.flavor: Clearing flooded tunnels to reach the deepest riches.

8.name: Pillared Gallery
8.flavor: Intricate subterranean networks of hauling and extraction.

10.name: Under-Kingdom
10.flavor: Total mastery of the earth. The mountains are hollowed and bled dry.

pasture.desc: Increases wool/hide/meat yield by 50% per level.

1.name: Grazing Land
1.flavor: Basic fenced areas for herds to wander.

3.name: Shearing Sheds
3.flavor: Dedicated spaces for processing wool and hides.

6.name: Breeding Stables
6.flavor: Selective breeding results in larger, hardier livestock.

10.name: The King's Ranch
10.flavor: Endless herds stretching to the horizon.

blacksmith.desc: Increases steel production efficiency by 100% per level.

1.name: Village Smithy
1.flavor: A single anvil rings out, forging horseshoes and spearheads.

3.name: Ironworks
3.flavor: Several fires burn constantly, churning out ingots.

5.name: Foundry
5.flavor: Liquid metal flows into molds day and night.

7.name: Blast Furnace
7.flavor: Massive bellows pump air into towers of flame.

10.name: The Vulcan Complex
10.flavor: The sky is black with soot. This place births armies.

tannery.desc: Increases leather production efficiency by 100% per level.

1.name: Tanner's Yard
1.flavor: The smell of urea and curing hide is unmistakable.

5.name: Refining Vats
5.flavor: Advanced chemical washes produce softer, stronger leathers.

10.name: Imperial Leatherworks
10.flavor: Supplying the saddles and armor of a thousand knights.

weaver.desc: Increases cloth production efficiency by 100% per level.

1.name: Loom Room
1.flavor: Wooden looms click-clack as thread becomes cloth.

5.name: Textile Mill
5.flavor: Coordinated looms and dyeing vats produce vast quantities of fabric.

10.name: The Tapestry Master
10.flavor: Fabrics so fine they are traded for their weight in silver.

brewery.desc: Increases ale production efficiency by 100% per level.

1.name: Small Batch Fermenter
1.flavor: Vats of bubbling mash produce thick, dark ale.

5.name: Distillery
5.flavor: Pipes and barrels for mass fermentation and aging.

10.name: The Celestial Keg
10.flavor: Known across the world; a sip can make a pauper feel like a king.

tailor.desc: Increases garment production efficiency by 100% per level.

1.name: Seamstress Shop
1.flavor: Repairing tunics and sewing basic shirts.

5.name: Clothier Guild
5.flavor: The town's elite come here for custom doublets and gowns.

10.name: High Fashion House
10.flavor: Dictating the style of the entire kingdom's court.

goldsmith.desc: Increases jewelry production efficiency by 100% per level.

1.name: Jeweler's Bench
1.flavor: Setting small stones into copper rings.

5.name: Artisan's Workshop
5.flavor: Fine gold wire and precious gems are crafted into masterworks.

10.name: The Royal Treasury Shop
10.flavor: Only Emperors and Gods can afford these creations.

stone_walls.desc: Increases settlement defense, reducing damage to garrison and hindering attackers.

1.name: Palisade
1.flavor: Sharpened wooden stakes to deter the wolves and bandits.

2.name: Reinforced Gate
2.flavor: Iron-banded oak that can withstand many a ramming.

3.name: Watch Towers
3.flavor: High vantage points for archers to fire down upon the foe.

4.name: Machicolations
4.flavor: Opening in the floor to drop stones and boiling oil.

5.name: Stone Curtain Wall
5.flavor: Huge granite blocks that shrug off fire and axe alike.

6.name: Merlons & Battlements
6.flavor: Crenelated walls to provide cover for the defenders.

7.name: Wall-Mounted Balistas
7.flavor: Black-bolt engines capable of skewering knights and horses.

8.name: Great Keep
8.flavor: A final redoubt where the garrison can retreat and regroup.

9.name: Moat & Drawbridge
9.flavor: Water and depth. The ultimate bottleneck for any army.

10.name: The Star Fort
10.flavor: A geometric masterpiece of killing zones. To attack is suicide.

barracks.desc: Increases garrison capacity, recruitment volume (odd levels) and troop quality (even levels).

1.name: Muster Field
1.flavor: A muddy field where peasants learn to hold a spear. Increased muster volume.

2.name: Drill Square
2.flavor: Strict sergeants bark orders. Unlocks Tier 2 Trained soldiers.

3.name: Garrison Quarters
3.flavor: Soldiers live here full-time. Even greater muster capacity.

5.name: Training Hall
5.flavor: A dedicated facility for the local levy. Massive muster capacity.

6.name: Veteran Lodge
6.flavor: The air smells of old leather. Unlocks Tier 4 Veteran soldiers.

7.name: Military District
7.flavor: Entire city blocks dedicated to the march. Imperial muster volume.

8.name: Officer's Academy
8.flavor: War is studied as a science. Unlocks Tier 5 Royal Guards.

9.name: War Room
9.flavor: Planning for global conquest. Maximum muster capacity.

10.name: Citadel of Marshals
10.flavor: The pinnacle of military might. Elite quality and quantity.

1.name: Training Field
1.flavor: Wooden swords and straw targets.

10.name: War College
10.flavor: Recruits leave as seasoned veterans before their first real battle.

granary.desc: Increases starvation resistance and food storage cap by 50% per level.

1.name: Food Cellar
1.flavor: Cold, dry storage for grain.

4.name: Raised Granary
4.flavor: Elevated structures keep pests away from the stockpile.

10.name: The Eternal Silo
10.flavor: Stored food can last through a decade-long siege.

watchtower.desc: Increases stability and reduces bandit loot success chance.

1.name: Lookout Post
1.flavor: A simple wooden platform with a bell.

5.name: Stone Beacon
5.flavor: Fires lit at the top can signal trouble for leagues.

10.name: The Vigilant Eye
10.flavor: Not a bird flies by without the tower's knowledge.

housing_district.desc: Increases population capacity by 100 per level.

1.name: Thatched Cottages
1.flavor: Simple homes for simple folk.

5.name: Stone Tenements
5.flavor: Rows of sturdy buildings housing dozens of families.

10.name: The High District
10.flavor: Ornate villas and sprawling estates for a massive populace.

market.desc: Increases industrial slots and trade income.

1.name: Town Stalls
1.flavor: Farmers shouting prices over bushel baskets.

3.name: Tax Office
3.flavor: A grim building where the Lord's due is weighed and counted.

6.name: Guild Hall
6.flavor: Merchants meet behind closed doors to decide who gets rich.

10.name: The Grand Exchange
10.flavor: The gold of the world flows through these ledgers.

road_network.desc: Increases trade throughput and tax efficiency by 15%.

1.name: Dirt Paths
1.flavor: Better than bush-whacking, but muddy in the rain.

5.name: Cobblestone Streets
5.flavor: Paved paths for carts and horses.

10.name: Imperial Highways
10.flavor: Straight, smooth roads built to last ages.

merchant_guild.desc: Increases caravan capacity and global trade reach.

1.name: Local Chapterhouse
1.flavor: Where local traders talk shop.

5.name: National Registry
5.flavor: Coordinating trade across the entire kingdom.

10.name: World Trade Council
10.flavor: Controlling the flow of gold between continents.

warehouse_district.desc: Increases total inventory storage limit by 100% per level.

1.name: Basement Storage
1.flavor: Extra space beneath the shops.

10.name: The Great Vaults
10.flavor: Capable of holding the riches of a fallen empire.

cathedral.desc: Massively increases stability and loyalty of the Nobility.

1.name: Sanctuary
1.flavor: A quiet place for prayer.

10.name: The Seat of Divines
10.flavor: Where Kings are crowned and gods are said to walk.

1.name: Alehouse
1.flavor: Cheap swill and loud songs.

4.name: Traveler's Inn
4.flavor: Warm beds attract sellswords from distant lands.

7.name: Bard's College
7.flavor: Songs are powerful. A good tune can make a tyrant look like a savior.

10.name: The Shadow Broker
10.flavor: The bartender knows everything. For the right price, so do you.
